description: Proficiency at the intermediate level in listening, speaking, reading and writing, using communicative approaches. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department. Not open to students with credit for LCA LANG 471 prior to Fall 2019.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 140(or LCA LANG 372 prior to Fall 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 239
